title: BRED Editor
author: AtexBg :3
long_description: A simple but useful save editor for Pokémon Red/Blue (Yellow may work too but it's currently untested) for the 3DS, still a beta version but many features are planned to be added. An emulator is also embed inside the app to quickly test changes (ROM not included for obvious reasons)
preinstall_message: Put your Pokémon Blue/Red save file at "SD:/3ds/bedit/SAVE.sav" (case-sensitive) before launching the app.
